required_complexity_patterns.notes: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell
When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient

reference_templates.title: Deep wrapped label
reference_templates.notes: Label without for wraps input three div levels deep
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Deep wrapped label

reference_templates.title: Submit outside form
reference_templates.notes: Submit button outside form linked via form= attribute
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: External submit

reference_templates.title: Meter self assessment
reference_templates.notes: Self-assessment field uses meter element near text inputs

Meter element

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Reference DOM (Deep wrapped label): Label without for wraps input three div levels deep Reference DOM (Submit outside form): Submit button outside form linked via form= attribute Reference DOM (Meter self assessment): Self-assessment field uses meter element near text inputs Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: aria-label-only, label-wraps-deep, div-role-textbox, iframe-apply, native-select-not-combobox. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: definition list dl/dt/dd label pairs. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Deep wrapped label; Submit outside form; Meter self assessment.
